title: Add PromptPilot MCP Server to video_audio
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: PromptPilot takes flight
gist.blurb: PromptPilot just dropped a new MCP server powered by Pollinations. Now your favorite AI agents like Claude and Cursor can generate images, video, and audio directly from the chat.
gist.summary: Added the PromptPilot MCP Server to the community showcase, enabling multimedia generation directly within MCP-compatible AI agents.
gist.impact: Developers can now seamlessly generate images, video, and audio right inside their favorite AI coding assistants and chat interfaces using the Pollinations API.
gist.visual_concept: PromptPilot implies flying/piloting, while MCP implies connecting agents. Polly the bee wearing an aviator hat/goggles (pilot), plugging a glowing cable (MCP connection) into a retro terminal or the Monitor Robot to give it multimedia powers.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny aviator goggles, plugging a glowing lime green (#ecf874) cable into a chunky retro computer terminal. The screen displays colorful pixelated images and audio waves. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
